summary: A build step that attempted to download the nydus static tarball failed because HTTP fetches were canceled, causing the wget command to exit with code 1 and the build to be canceled.
root_cause: Network fetches were canceled during the build: several blob fetches report "context canceled" and the shell command 'wget ... nydus-static-...tgz' returned exit code 1, causing the solve to fail.

evidence.quote: fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/quayio-production-s3/sha256/02/0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80?X-Amz
evidence.reason: Shows an HTTP GET request for a blob failed while fetching a layer.

evidence.quote: fetch failed" digest="sha256:c1bc68842c41cb716734641f75dc37d629f05df5f812a8cc2e7e0370d4e833ec" error="failed to do request: Get \"https://quay.io/v2/minio/minio/blobs/sha256:c1bc68842c41cb716734641f75dc37d629f05df5f812a8cc2e7e0370d4e833ec": context canceled
evidence.reason: Explicitly records that the fetch failed with 'context canceled', indicating the request was aborted.

evidence.quote: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: The build step running wget to download the nydus tarball exited with code 1, the immediate failing command.

evidence.quote: /moby.buildkit.v1.Control/Solve returned error: rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled
evidence.reason: The build solver reports the overall operation was canceled due to the context cancellation.
Reinforces that the job ended because of a canceled context rather than a compilation or test assertion failure.

suggested_fix: Check network connectivity from the CI runner to GitHub and quay.io and retry the job. If downloads are flaky, either vendor/cache the nydus artifact in the repository or CI cache, increase network/timeouts in the build step, or add retry logic around the wget download.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows. This entry was backfilled from known run-time env: CILOGBENCH_OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5-mini, default base_url, default max_completion_tokens=4096. resolved_model and system_fingerprint are not recoverable from the original API responses.
